rulings.Case Title: PHILLIP GARCIA VS. CARRIE WILSON, IN HER CAPACITCY AS TRUSTEE OF THE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO REQUEST, DEMAND INSPECTION, PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 7, 2015, Line 3: PLAINTIFF PHILLIP GARCIA'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO REQUEST, DEMAND INSPECTION, PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS. DENIED. As to the deposition question regarding Carrie Wilson's bank, motion is denied. This information is protected by Carrie Wilson's right to privacy. As to the request for production at the deposition, the motion is denied without prejudice for Plaintiff to bring it again after the deposition. Defendant shall produce all responsive documents and a detailed privilege log. The issue re: waiver of objections will than be addressed. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. SUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO VS. ALBERTO ARAMBULA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 7, 2015, Line 6: DEFENDANT ALBERTO ARAMBULA'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. overruled, 5 days to answer. Defendant's tenancy and tenancy rights are issues of fact not properly raised on demurrer. First Amended Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer under CCP 1161a and alleges that Dzib in not a tenant. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. SUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO VS. ALBERTO ARAMBULA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 7, 2015, Line 6: DEFENDANT SANTOS DZIB'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Overruled, 5 days to answer. First Amended Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detained under CCP 1161a against the former trustor. Defendant improperly raises issues of fact on demurrer. =(501/REQ)
